steps.title: Identify the key contrast in Brooks's judgment
steps.content: Brooks found the storytelling in the 2016 version very confusing, but enthusiastically praised the storytelling in the 2019 version. The word “However” marks this reversal. A negative-to-positive shift in judgment about the same element, between two points in time, points directly to improvement.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content: The correct answer states exactly this — the musical improved between 2016 and 2019. The other three either contradict Brooks's demonstrated judgment (B and D reverse the relationship) or address an irrelevant detail (C). That confirms A is correct.
